templates.title: Example manual task: {topic}
templates.description: TODO: the brief for this task. {topic} is a placeholder the co-founder fills in when dispatching. A template with no `recurrence` is a manual template — the co-founder dispatches it on demand.

templates.title: Daily digest — {date}
templates.description: End-of-day digest. (1) Pull today's completed and in-flight work via `list_tasks` and write a 3–5 line digest of outcomes the co-founder can forward to the user — wins, blockers, what's queued for tomorrow. (2) Before closing, scan for follow-ups uncovered today and `create_task` each one against yourself so tomorrow's queue is ready when you wake. (3) If there is genuinely nothing worth reporting, reply with the literal token `NO_REPLY` — don't post empty digests. Swap `recurrence` to `weekly` or change `time` ("HH:MM TZ") if a different cadence fits the squad's KPI better.
